description: accessors-smart provides an ASM-based helper for generating fast Java bean accessors for getter, setter, constructor, and field access operations. It is used by json-smart to reduce reflection overhead when mapping and converting object properties.

accessors-smart provides an ASM-based helper for generating fast bean accessors for getter, setter, constructor, and field access operations. It is used by json-smart to reduce the overhead of Java reflection when mapping and converting object properties.
